channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Hear Joyeria's alluringly eerie new single "The Curse"
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Hear Joyeria's alluringly eerie new single "The Curse"
item.content:encoded: Hear Joyeria's alluringly eerie new single "The Curse"

item.title: More 👉 stereogum.com/2505029/beck...
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: More 👉 stereogum.com/2505029/beck...
item.content:encoded: More 👉 stereogum.com/2505029/beck...

item.title: The house band was Beck’s one-time touring group and his set…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The house band was Beck’s one-time touring group and his sets included Elliott Smith’s “Needle In The Hay” (‘The Royal Tenenbaums’), the Bobby Fuller Four’s “Let Her Dance” (‘Fantastic Mr. Fox’), and Love’s “Alone Again Or” and Oliver Onions’ “Zorro Is Back” (both from ‘Bottle Rocket’).
item.content:encoded: The house band was Beck’s one-time touring group and his sets included Elliott Smith’s “Needle In The Hay” (‘The Royal Tenenbaums’), the Bobby Fuller Four’s “Let Her Dance” (‘Fantastic Mr. Fox’), and Love’s “Alone Again Or” and Oliver Onions’ “Zorro Is Back” (both from ‘Bottle Rocket’).

item.title: Karen O covered “Making Time,” heard in the 1998 film ‘Rushm…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Karen O covered “Making Time,” heard in the 1998 film ‘Rushmore.’ The Yeah Yeah Yeahs singer sang the Creation classic and the Stones’ “Play With Fire” (from ‘The Darjeeling Limited’) at the Hollywood Bowl’s tribute to the music of Wes Anderson movies over the weekend.

stereogum.com/2505029/beck...
item.content:encoded:
Karen O covered “Making Time,” heard in the 1998 film ‘Rushmore.’ The Yeah Yeah Yeahs singer sang the Creation classic and the Stones’ “Play With Fire” (from ‘The Darjeeling Limited’) at the Hollywood Bowl’s tribute to the music of Wes Anderson movies over the weekend.

stereogum.com/2505029/beck...

item.title: Album of the Day: Ferries, "Eye Wander." The anonymous band'…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Album of the Day: Ferries, "Eye Wander." The anonymous band's debut is the best kind of musical secret, a body-shaking mash-up of dub and psychedelia.
item.content:encoded: Album of the Day: Ferries, "Eye Wander." The anonymous band's debut is the best kind of musical secret, a body-shaking mash-up of dub and psychedelia.

item.title: Rashida Jones and Will McCormack met decades ago, when McCor…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Rashida Jones and Will McCormack met decades ago, when McCormack's sister set them up on a date. It didn't work out as a romantic pairing, but it was the start of a long-running creative partnership. n.pr/3SXlzpi
item.content:encoded: Rashida Jones and Will McCormack met decades ago, when McCormack's sister set them up on a date. It didn't work out as a romantic pairing, but it was the start of a long-running creative partnership. n.pr/3SXlzpi

item.title: We’re helping to get the word out about a great festival hap…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: We’re helping to get the word out about a great festival happening at the end of July. Get your tickets now for @soundwallfest.bsky.social featuring Ringo Deathstarr & more.
item.content:encoded: We’re helping to get the word out about a great festival happening at the end of July. Get your tickets now for @soundwallfest.bsky.social featuring Ringo Deathstarr & more.

item.title: “You just gotta go.” Water Damage and Setting embrace the ri…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: “You just gotta go.” Water Damage and Setting embrace the risk, repetition, and shared discovery at the heart of improvisation.
item.content:encoded: “You just gotta go.” Water Damage and Setting embrace the risk, repetition, and shared discovery at the heart of improvisation.

item.title: The move comes after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire for th…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The move comes after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire for the third weekend in a row, raising the specter of a return to all-out war after a shaky ceasefire took effect in June. n.pr/4hbNVpz
item.content:encoded: The move comes after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire for the third weekend in a row, raising the specter of a return to all-out war after a shaky ceasefire took effect in June. n.pr/4hbNVpz

item.title: On this week's episode of Bandcamp's @eastvillageradio.bsky.…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: On this week's episode of Bandcamp's @eastvillageradio.bsky.social show, we explore Thailand’s emerging electronic scene, where traditional sounds meet house, dub, experimental club music, and more. Tune in today at 6 PM EST.
item.content:encoded: On this week's episode of Bandcamp's @eastvillageradio.bsky.social show, we explore Thailand’s emerging electronic scene, where traditional sounds meet house, dub, experimental club music, and more. Tune in today at 6 PM EST.

item.title: For nearly five decades, Mikal Gilmore helped document the a…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: For nearly five decades, Mikal Gilmore helped document the artists, albums, and movements that shaped modern music. On Friday, July 17, at noon PST, collectors can shop the personal collection he built while chronicling rock history from the inside: https://disc.gs/4vqjUWt
item.content:encoded: For nearly five decades, Mikal Gilmore helped document the artists, albums, and movements that shaped modern music. On Friday, July 17, at noon PST, collectors can shop the personal collection he built while chronicling rock history from the inside: https://disc.gs/4vqjUWt

item.description: L7's Jennifer Finch reveals brain cancer diagnosis

item.title: California is among the states suing to block Paramount from…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: California is among the states suing to block Paramount from buying Warner Bros. Discovery in a Hollywood mega-merger that would unite some of the nation's largest movie studios and TV newsrooms. n.pr/4peiT2k
item.content:encoded: California is among the states suing to block Paramount from buying Warner Bros. Discovery in a Hollywood mega-merger that would unite some of the nation's largest movie studios and TV newsrooms. n.pr/4peiT2k

item.title: These snakes can go for months without eating, grow and shri…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: These snakes can go for months without eating, grow and shrink the size of their hearts and jump start their metabolism on a dime. n.pr/4peQXvc
item.content:encoded: These snakes can go for months without eating, grow and shrink the size of their hearts and jump start their metabolism on a dime. n.pr/4peQXvc

item.title: Today we're taking a look at our Discord server’s top albums…
item.author: Record Club (@record.club)
item.description:
Today we're taking a look at our Discord server’s top albums. Are any of these in your current rotation? Any you haven’t listened to? Let us know below in the comments.

For a comprehensive list of releases or to see what the community is saying, head to record.club and join the conversation now.
item.content:encoded:
Today we're taking a look at our Discord server’s top albums. Are any of these in your current rotation? Any you haven’t listened to? Let us know below in the comments.

For a comprehensive list of releases or to see what the community is saying, head to record.club and join the conversation now.

item.title: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire over the weekend amid tensi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire over the weekend amid tensions over the Strait of Hormuz. And, Congress returns from recess facing tight deadlines. n.pr/4gBsr5l
item.content:encoded: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire over the weekend amid tensions over the Strait of Hormuz. And, Congress returns from recess facing tight deadlines. n.pr/4gBsr5l

item.title: Mastodon announce 'Marrow Deep,' their first album in five y…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Mastodon announce 'Marrow Deep,' their first album in five years and first since the death of ex-bandmate Brent Hinds; hear them team with @qotsa-official.bsky.social's Josh Homme on "Snakes For Dinner"

item.title: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters w…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters with personalized text messages, making AI-generated texting conversations the latest tool political campaigns are using to connect.
item.content:encoded: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters with personalized text messages, making AI-generated texting conversations the latest tool political campaigns are using to connect.

item.title: Our column The Alternative Number Ones looks at the Verve Pi…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)

item.content:encoded: Our column The Alternative Number Ones looks at the Verve Pipe's one big hit, the melodramatic quasi-grunge ballad "The Freshmen"

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: Social media can make a song go viral — even push it up the …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Social media can make a song go viral — even push it up the pop charts — seemingly overnight. Perhaps it's not surprising that some influencers are being paid to promote music without disclosing it. n.pr/4ynw19K
item.content:encoded: Social media can make a song go viral — even push it up the pop charts — seemingly overnight. Perhaps it's not surprising that some influencers are being paid to promote music without disclosing it. n.pr/4ynw19K

item.title: After getting hit with tariffs for the imported board games …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: After getting hit with tariffs for the imported board games he sells, Jonathan Silva decided to see if he could produce a version of his Monopoly game in the United States. This is what he learned.
item.content:encoded: After getting hit with tariffs for the imported board games he sells, Jonathan Silva decided to see if he could produce a version of his Monopoly game in the United States. This is what he learned.

item.title: ◤ 🌱草川拓弥（#超特急）◢ 「みなしょー」以来の仲・金井純一監督と ラフすぎる？舞台挨拶 🎬 監督が思う…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
◤ 🌱草川拓弥（#超特急）◢
「みなしょー」以来の仲・金井純一監督と
ラフすぎる？舞台挨拶 🎬

監督が思う草川拓弥の魅力とは
「映像で見てもカッコいいし、実際に見てもカッコいい。そこにギャップがないのは、なかなかいない」

⏬詳細・📸写真17枚
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680668?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social
item.content:encoded:
◤ 🌱草川拓弥（#超特急）◢
「みなしょー」以来の仲・金井純一監督と
ラフすぎる？舞台挨拶 🎬

監督が思う草川拓弥の魅力とは
「映像で見てもカッコいいし、実際に見てもカッコいい。そこにギャップがないのは、なかなかいない」

⏬詳細・📸写真17枚
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680668?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social
